history.content:
<thought>
The cells directly ahead are unknown or blocked by the corridor layout, and the visible path to the right side appears unsafe due to lava blocks nearby. Turning left should orient me toward the open passage instead of the lava-filled area.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I need to change direction to avoid it. Turning left is the safest immediate step to reorient away from the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing a wall directly ahead, so moving forward is impossible. The open cells are to my left, so I should rotate to face that direction and continue through the safe corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>
